subcodes.first_line: We have hearkened unto thy call, and caused thee to hear Our call from aforetime, for verily We are the All-Hearing. We have beheld thee, and have caused thee to behold Our countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمعنا ندائک و اسمعناک ندائی من قبل و انا السمیع قد رایناک و اریناک منظری و
